scanType: Focused scan: Funding Rounds & Investors watchlist
summary: Kalshi raised $1B at $22B valuation led by Coatue Management (March 19, 2026). Doubled from $11B in December. Estimated ~$1.5B annualized revenue. Valued at 14-15x revenue.
Polymarket exploring raise at ~$20B valuation (up from $8B ICE-led round). Kalshi now modestly ahead on paper.

5c(c) Capital: first VC fund dedicated to prediction market startups. Raising $35M to back ~20 early-stage companies over 2 years. Focus: infra, data tools, liquidity, compliance (NOT exchanges). Backed by Kalshi CEO Tarek Mansour, Polymarket CEO Shayne Coplan, Marc Andreessen (via Moneta Luna), Micky Malka (Ribbit Capital), Kyle Samani (ex-Multicoin). First close within a month.
Mastercard acquired BVNK (stablecoin infra) for up to $1.8B. Stablecoins and payments are the strongest VC theme in 2026.
Notable DeFi derivatives projects attracting attention: Paradex (zero-fee ZK perps), Boros (funding rate derivatives), World Markets (unified margin DEX), Ostium (RWA perps).

relationships.relationship: first dedicated VC fund, investing in infra/data/liquidity/compliance
backer (Kalshi CEO backing a fund that invests in prediction market infra)
LEVER is exactly the kind of prediction market infra startup this fund targets

workstreamTags.CEO: CRITICAL FUNDRAISING INTEL: (1) 5c(c) Capital is the FIRST dedicated prediction market VC fund, raising $35M, first close within a month. LEVER fits their thesis perfectly (prediction market infra, not an exchange). Backed by both Kalshi and Polymarket CEOs plus Andreessen and Ribbit. This is a warm target. (2) Kalshi at $22B and Polymarket at ~$20B set the comp range. LEVER as derivative infrastructure on top of these platforms can cite these as TAM anchors. (3) Coatue leading at 14-15x revenue multiple is the valuation benchmark.
workstreamTags.ADVISOR: The prediction market sector has crossed from 'emerging' to 'institutional' territory. $22B Kalshi + $20B Polymarket + $2B ICE investment + dedicated VC fund = this is now a recognized asset class. LEVER's fundraising window is open NOW.
workstreamTags.BUILD: Paradex (zero-fee ZK perps), Boros (funding rate derivatives), Ostium (RWA perps) are worth studying as DeFi derivatives architectural references.
workstreamTags.SECURE: Kalshi raising at $22B despite criminal charges in Arizona and regulatory pressure shows investor confidence in the sector, but also that regulatory risk is being priced as manageable, not existential.
